steps.title: Use the example
steps.content: The example says Benton's broken brushstrokes were inspired by light shining through leaves in her garden. The blank must describe how the flowers and trees at her home shaped her artistic work.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: A says nature restricted her work, which the example does not support. B says it announced her work, which is illogical. C says it distracted her, contradicting the idea of inspiration. The remaining word means shaped or affected. The answer is D.
